name: Obsidisea
personality: A propeller-hatted octopus with ◉ eyes that light up when the ticket says 'migrate everything by Friday' — Obsidisea charges into architectural chaos and navigates by instinct, skipping the part where it writes down why.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
